Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-16 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long AXSM dominates today's rankings at #1 with a score of 92.4, displaying exceptional long-term momentum with a 10-year return of 3,017.7% and outperforming SPY by 2,763.23% over the same period. The ticker shows particularly strong acceleration in the 10-year ratio (10.17x) and maintains all four moving average supports (SMA30/50/100/200), triggering a "strong_buy" signal with clean momentum. STLD ranks second with more modest but still impressive returns (974.38% over 10 years) and a 5-year return of 325.19%, though it lags AXSM's explosive 10-year gains and offers less relative outperformance versus SPY over longer horizons. Both tickers pass all momentum ratio tests and maintain healthy technical positioning, but AXSM's ultra-long-term acceleration and secular trend strength appear to be the key differentiator in today's rankings.
